case_title: CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU INC. VS. CAROL NUNEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-13-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-04-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUNEZ, CAROL $1,228.51 PRINCIPAL, $307.14 ATTORNEY FEES, $207.33 INTEREST, $199.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,942.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
